19493.description: Tessa Jaspmarsh the 2nd was first described as average height, lean, brown hair, dark eyes, with restless bearing.

19494.description: Cira Dorstone was first described as short, sturdy, silver streaked hair, amber eyes, with steady bearing.

19495.description: Zane Galreach the 23rd was first described as towering, lean, brown hair, green eyes, with bold bearing.

19496.description: Rosa Dorstone the 2nd was first described as towering, heavyset, black hair, dark eyes, with bold bearing.

19497.description: Garin Brighthelm the 2nd was first described as towering, heavyset, silver streaked hair, gray eyes, with calm bearing.

19498.description: Ulf Jaspmarsh was first described as compact, heavyset, closely shorn hair, gray eyes, with steady bearing.

19499.description: Ivo Jaspmarsh the 2nd was first described as tall, lean, black hair, green eyes, with bold bearing.
